introSection: Speed-O-Plane was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Kennywood in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened in 1911 and replaced Scenic Railway.

The ride was remodeled in 1921.

The ride was removed after the 1923 season.

fullText:
Speed-O-Plane was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Kennywood in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, USA.

The ride opened in 1911 and replaced Scenic Railway.

The ride was remodeled in 1921.

The ride was removed after the 1923 season.
